Package Installation Guide

Source: vignettes/package-install.Rmd
package-install.Rmd

Installation

You can install the development version of analysiskmeans from GitHub with:

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("nsmodi/analysiskmeans")

Or you can also …

# library(devtools)
# remotes::install_github("nsmodi/analysiskmeans")

Troubleshooting

This package depends on a multitude of other packages. If you are having issues with analysiskmeans, check your installation of the other dependencies listed below!

  • library(analysiskmeans)
  • library(utils)
  • library(stats)
  • library(ggplot2)
  • library(SummarizedExperiment)
  • library(BiocManager)
  • library(SingleCellExperiment)

Further Questions

If you have further questions on the installation of analysiskmeans, please reach out to me directly at ‘naamna.modi@stjude.org’! I will be happy to help!
